title: thymus hyemalis subsp. hyemalis
intro: Thymus hyemalis subsp. hyemalis, also known as winter thyme or mountain thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which make it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal medicine. The plant is used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin infections, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Thymus hyemalis subsp. hyemalis is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to soothe sore throats, ease cold and flu symptoms, and promote overall well-being.
